Predefined Swaps

  • Uses of StringSwap in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap

    Subclasses of StringSwap in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AutoStringSwap<T>
    A dynamic string swap that serializes objects via Object.toString() and deserializes via fromString(String), valueOf(String), or a single-String-argument constructor.

  • Uses of StringSwap in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps

    Subclasses of StringSwap in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BinarySwap
    Thin delegating swap for top-level byte[] values in textual serializers.
    class 
    ClassFormatSwap
    Thin delegating swap for Class values driven by the context-configured ClassFormat.
    class 
    InputStreamSwap
    Transforms InputStreams to Strings.
    static class 
    InputStreamSwap.Base64
    Converts InputStreams to BASE-64 encoding.
    static class 
    InputStreamSwap.Hex
    Converts InputStreams to hex encoding.
    static class 
    InputStreamSwap.SpacedHex
    Converts InputStreams to spaced-hex encoding.
    class 
    MarshallingStringSwap<T>
    Transforms beans into Strings by simply calling the Object.toString() method.
    class 
    ReaderSwap
    Transforms Readers to Strings.
    class 
    StringFormatSwap
    Built-in object swap implementation class for the @MarshalledProp(format) annotation.
    class 
    UrlSwap
    Transforms URL objects to and from Strings.
